quick_context: conduit-vscode v0.1.0 — VS Code extension bridging conduit-bridge proxy. Full feature set built: chat panel, inline suggestions, inline edit, explain/refactor/tests, fix diagnostics, terminal suggestions, bridge manager panel with start/stop/login per provider. Build passes. Not yet tested in VS Code, no tests, no .vsix. Next: T-002 (auto-start bridge) then T-004 (tests) then T-005 (.vsix packaging).
